synthesis.content: Vietnam aims to save at least 3% of total power consumption. The country also plans for the safe operation of two Ninh Thuan nuclear power plants. These plans are part of Vietnam's utility standards at the national level.

sentences: Vietnam aims to save at least 3% of total power consumption.

These plans are part of Vietnam's utility standards at the national level.
